data.text: AT 75.17 HUGE ISLAND WITH HUGE CANNON, AND A CRATER IN THE CENTRE
AY 75.17 ISLAND BELIVED TO BE VOLCANIC ONLY
AT 75.17 ISLAND'S LANDSCAPE ALL ROCK, BUT IT CONTAINS MANY LIFEFORMS!
AT 75.18 TRANSPARENT FLORA FOUND ON BOTH ISLANDS
THIS PLANET HAS SOME BEUTIFUL DISCS
AT 75.19 REFLECTIVE SOLID SURFACE FOUND - ICE BELIVED
AT 75.19 REFLECTIVE SURFACE POSSESS PATTERN WHEN SEEN FROM SKY
AT 75.19 AFTER GATHERING COURAGE I WALKED OVER THE REFLECTIVE SURFACE
AT 75.19 REFLECTIVE SURFACE SUPPORTED MY WEIGHT, SAMPLES TAKEN
AT 75.24 BIG ISLAND WITH MANY PONDS, NO LIFEFORM AT VIEW
